title: hypericum patulum var. uralum
intro: Hypericum patulum var. uralum, also known as Ural St. John's Wort, is a perennial plant species belonging to the St. John's Wort family (Hypericaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial compounds, and has been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Hypericum patulum var. uralum include its potential to reduce anxiety and depression, as well as its antiseptic and antiviral properties, making it useful for wound healing and immune system support. In herbal preparations, the plant's aerial parts are typically used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal benefits.
